title: tarenna mollis
intro: Tarenna mollis, also known as the hairy tarenna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. In herbal preparations, tarenna mollis is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its leaves and roots are sometimes used in traditional remedies.
